R Notebook

library(fixest)
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(lmerTest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(fixest)
library(useful)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(lpirfs)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

source("emileRegs.R")

Data

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
gdp <- read_csv("raw data/DOSE_V2.11.csv") 
wind <- read_csv("processed data/maxgust_gadm1_era5.csv") 



data_tc <- gdp %>% left_join(wind, by = c("year", "GID_1"))


data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    loggdp = log(grp_pc_usd),
    gdp = grp_pc_usd,
    gdp_diff = loggdp - lag(loggdp, 1),
    year2 = year^2,
    maxwind1 = maxwind,
    maxwind2 = maxwind^2,
    maxwind3 = maxwind^3,

    period = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"),
    decade = case_when(
      year >= 1960 & year < 1970 ~ "1960s",
      year >= 1970 & year < 1980 ~ "1970s",
      year >= 1980 & year < 1990 ~ "1980s",
      year >= 1990 & year < 2000 ~ "1990s",
      year >= 2000 & year < 2010 ~ "2000s",
      year >= 2010 & year < 2020 ~ "2010s",
    ),
    period3 = case_when(
      year < 1980 ~ "1960-1980",
      year >= 1980 & year < 2000 ~ "1980-1999",
      year >= 2000 ~ "2000-2019"
    )
    
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_95 = ifelse(maxwind >= maxwind_p95, 1, 0),
    maxwind_p90 = quantile(maxwind, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_90 = ifelse(maxwind >= maxwind_p90, 1, 0),
    wind_10ms = ifelse(maxwind >= 10, 1, 0),
    wind_21ms = ifelse(maxwind >= 21, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
  #remove NAN from gdp and maxwind
  filter(!is.na(gdp_diff) & !is.na(maxwind)) %>% 
  filter(year>=1960 & year<=2019)


data_tc$continent <- countrycode(data_tc$GID_0,
                                 origin = "iso3c",
                                 destination = "continent")



make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1960,
  baseline_end   = 2019
) {

  # residualize (country FE only)
  fe_model <- lm(
    reformulate(
      "as.factor(GID_1) + as.factor(year)",
      response = var
    ),
    data = data
  )

  shock_name <- paste0(var, "_shock")
  treat_name <- paste0(var, "_treat")
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever")
  first_treat_name <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year")
  thresh_name <- paste0(shock_name, "_p")

  data[[shock_name]] <- resid(fe_model)

  # 🔹 GLOBAL threshold across all countries (baseline window only)
  global_thresh <- quantile(
    data[[shock_name]][
      data$year >= baseline_start & data$year <= baseline_end
    ],
    p,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  data <- data %>%
    group_by(GID_1) %>%
    mutate(

      # same threshold for everyone
      !!thresh_name := global_thresh,

      # treatment defined using global threshold
      !!treat_name := as.integer(
        .data[[shock_name]] >= global_thresh
      ),

      # zero out if underlying variable is zero
      !!treat_name := ifelse(.data[[var]] > 0, .data[[treat_name]], 0),

      # first treatment year
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1),
        min(year[.data[[treat_name]] == 1]),
        NA_real_
      ),

      # treat forever
      !!treat_forever_name := as.integer(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) &
          year >= .data[[first_treat_name]]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(data)
}


data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  make_shock("maxwind",p=0.90)

ANALYSES

model_main <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ 
                i(period3,maxwind1) + i(period3,maxwind2)  | year + GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year
                  , 
  data = data_tc, 
  panel.id = c("GID_1", "year")
)


max_x <- 50
min_x <- 0
rf_main <- useful::predict_poly_het(model_main,het.var = 'period3',df=data_tc,
                           xvar = "maxwind", max= max_x, min= min_x, ref=0) 

ggplot(rf_main, aes(x = temp, y = response, color=period3)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper,fill=period3), alpha = 0.2,color=NA) +
  #add 0 reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Maximum Wind Speed (knots)",
    y = "Predicted GDP Growth Response",
  ) 

model_main <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ 
                l0_maxwind_p1 + l0_maxwind_p2 + l1_maxwind_p1 + l1_maxwind_p2  + l2_maxwind_p1 + l2_maxwind_p2 +
    l3_maxwind_p1 + l3_maxwind_p2 + l4_maxwind_p1 + l4_maxwind_p2 + l5_maxwind_p1 + l5_maxwind_p2
                       | countrycode[year] + year  + countrycode[year2]
                  , 
  data = data_tc, 
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
Error in feols(gdp_diff ~ l0_maxwind_p1 + l0_maxwind_p2 + l1_maxwind_p1 +  : 
  The variables 'l0_maxwind_p1', 'l0_maxwind_p2', 'l1_maxwind_p1', 'l1_maxwind_p2', 'l2_maxwind_p1', 'l2_maxwind_p2' and 6
others are in the RHS (first part) of the formula but not in the data set.

Cross section

#avg over time
data_cross <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(GID_1) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind = mean(maxwind, na.rm=TRUE),
    avg_growth = mean(gdp_diff, na.rm=TRUE)
  )

model <- lm(
  avg_growth ~ poly(avg_wind, 2, raw=TRUE),
  data = data_cross
)
summary(model)

Call:
lm(formula = avg_growth ~ poly(avg_wind, 2, raw = TRUE), data = data_cross)

Residuals:
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-0.50167 -0.01225  0.00006  0.01341  0.52644 

Coefficients:
                                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
(Intercept)                    -3.808e-02  2.111e-02  -1.804   0.0715 .
poly(avg_wind, 2, raw = TRUE)1  3.228e-03  2.145e-03   1.505   0.1325  
poly(avg_wind, 2, raw = TRUE)2 -6.418e-05  5.279e-05  -1.216   0.2243  
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 0.05701 on 1544 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.003791,  Adjusted R-squared:  0.0025 
F-statistic: 2.937 on 2 and 1544 DF,  p-value: 0.0533
f <- useful::predict_poly(
  model,
  "avg_wind",
  min = min(data_cross$avg_wind, na.rm=TRUE),
  max = max(data_cross$avg_wind, na.rm=TRUE),
  ref = 0,
  xvar_name = "avg_wind",
  ci_level = 95
)

# Plot
ggplot(f, aes(x = avg_wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

FE-DL

irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_90",
  lags = -5:10,
  fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year + country^year",
  panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
)

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_wind_cumulative, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect",
    title = "Cumulative Distributed Lag Effects"
  )

results_list <- list()

lag_specs <- list(
  "5 lags" = -5:5,
  "10 lags" = -5:10,
  "12 lags" = -5:12,
  "15 lags" = -5:15
)

for (spec_name in names(lag_specs)) {
  results_list[[spec_name]] <- cumulative_dl(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "gdp_diff",
    main_var = "maxwind_90",
    lags = lag_specs[[spec_name]],
    fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year",
    panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
    shock_label = spec_name
  )
}

# Combine all results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list, .id = "specification")

# Plot with different specifications
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, 
                        color = specification, fill = specification)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification",
    color = "Specification",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


# Alternative: Faceted plot for clearer comparison
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ specification, nrow = 2) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification"
  )

results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_90",
  interact_var = "period",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year^country",
  panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_90",
  interact_var = "continent",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year^country",
  panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

LP MAIN EVENT

Shock Bilal


plot_shock_trends <- function(data, shock_var, break_year) {
  
  data %>%
    group_by( year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_shock = mean(.data[[shock_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = avg_shock)) +
    
    # raw series
    geom_line(color = "black", size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(color = "black", size = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
    
    # pre-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year < break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "blue",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # post-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year >= break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "red",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # break line
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = break_year,
      linetype = "dashed",
      size = 0.7
    ) +
    
    #facet_wrap(~ continent, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = paste("Average", shock_var)
    )
}

break_year <- 1990

plot_shock_trends(data_tc, "maxwind", break_year)



#correlation between shock variables
cor(data_tc$maxwind_shock, data_tc$maxwind, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4231298
break_year <- 1990

plot_df <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    sum_maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("sum_"),
    names_to = "treat_var",
    values_to = "sum_treat"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(year < break_year, "Pre", "Post")
  )

# averages per variable × period
avg_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(treat_var, period) %>%
  summarise(
    avg = mean(sum_treat, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = year, y = sum_treat)) +

  # --------------------
  # BLACK observed series, broken at break_year
  # --------------------
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_df, year < break_year),
    color = "black",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_df, year >= break_year),
    color = "black",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 2) +

  # --------------------
  # PERIOD-COLORED TRENDS
  # --------------------
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(plot_df, year < break_year),
    aes(color = period),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(plot_df, year >= break_year),
    aes(color = period),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.9
  ) +

  # --------------------
  # PERIOD-COLORED AVERAGES
  # --------------------
  geom_hline(
    data = avg_df,
    aes(yintercept = avg, color = period),
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 1
  ) +

  # --------------------
  # BREAK LINE
  # --------------------
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = break_year,
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.7
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      Pre  = myblue,
      Post = myred
    )
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Sum of Treatment Indicator",
    color = "Period"
  )

NA
NA

IRF

# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_90"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990"))

p_hist <- ggplot(data_tc_hist, aes(x = maxwind, fill = period)) +
  geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30) +
  labs(
    x = "Max wind speed (m/s)",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  #remove legend
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_shock = "Maximum Wind Speed shock",
  maxwind = "Maximum Wind Speed"
)

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year",
    panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myred) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myred) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year^country"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind shock",
    "Wind "
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(continent == "Americas")
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +ggtitle('Americas')


# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_90 = "Maximum Wind Speed >90thp",
  maxwind = "Maximum Wind Speed")

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year^country",
    panel_id = c("GID_1", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_90",
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/10y Wind speed (raw)",
    "Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/10y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "Wind speed (residualized)"
    
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 



lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_90",
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/10y Wind speed (raw)",
    "Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/10y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "Wind speed (residualized)"
    
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Raw vs residualized

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_90",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "wind_21ms"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/10y Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/10y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "> 21 m/s Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Continent


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

  var   = c(
    "maxwind_90",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "wind_21ms"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "> 21 m/s Wind speed"
  )
)

  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "country"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_90",
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/10y Wind speed",
    "1/10y Wind speed (residualized)"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","Japan","Australia"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Is it shaped by rich/poor

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- left_join(world, data_tc, by = c("iso_a3" = "GID_0"))

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_group),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_group"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

ROBUSTNESS


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_90"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year"
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"

# ----------------------------
# Full-sample IRF
# ----------------------------
irf_full <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = lp_outcome,
  main_var = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon = lp_horizon,
  fe = lp_fe,
  panel_id = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
) %>%
  mutate(
    loo_type = "Full sample",
    left_out = NA_character_
  )

# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-country-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_country <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$country) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(country != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country", left_out = .y)
  })
[WARNING] Deprecated: --no-highlight. Use --syntax-highlighting=none instead.
# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-year-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_year <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$year) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(year != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year", left_out = .y)
  })

# ----------------------------
# Combine all for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot_df <- bind_rows(irf_full, loo_country, loo_year) %>%
  mutate(loo_type = factor(loo_type, levels = c("Leave-one-country", "Leave-one-year", "Full sample")))

# ----------------------------
# Separate dataframes
# ----------------------------

# Full-sample IRFs
full_sample <- irf_plot_df %>% filter(loo_type == "Full sample")

# LOO by country
loo_country <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-country") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# LOO by year
loo_year <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-year") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# ----------------------------
# Plot function
# ----------------------------
plot_loo <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df) +
    # Full-sample IRFs (colored ribbons + lines)
    geom_ribbon(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
      alpha = 0.2, color = NA
    ) +
    
      # LOO IRFs (thin black lines)
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(!is.na(left_out)),
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, group = interaction(left_out, category)),
      color = "black",
      size = 0.2,
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
      size = 1.3
    ) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
    labs(
      x = "Horizon (years)",
      y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
      title = title,
      color = "Period",
      fill  = "Period"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top"
    )
}

# ----------------------------
# Generate plots
# ----------------------------
p_loo_country <- plot_loo(loo_country, "Leave-One-Country IRFs")
p_loo_year    <- plot_loo(loo_year, "Leave-One-Year IRFs")

# Display
p_loo_country

p_loo_year

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_panel_id <- c("GID_1", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"

fe_specs <- tibble(
  fe_label = c("Country + Year + Quadratic Trend", " Country + Year + Linear Trend", "Country + Year + ContinentxYear + Quad. Trend"),
  fe_var   = c("GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + year",
               "GID_1[year] + year",
               "GID_1[year] + GID_1[year2] + country^year")
)

shock_map <- tibble(
  main_var   = "maxwind_90",
  shock_label = "1/10y Wind speed"
)

run_lp_fe <- function(fe_var, fe_label) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data_tc,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = shock_map$main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = fe_var,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(fe_label = fe_label)
}


irfs_all <- fe_specs %>%
  pmap_dfr(~ run_lp_fe(..2, ..1))  # ..1 = fe_label, ..2 = fe_var

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ fe_label, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_95"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_interact <- "period"

# ----------------------------
# Run main IRF (DK SE)
# ----------------------------
irf_dk <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula  = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "DK")

# ----------------------------
# Run IRF with clustered SEs (no fill)
# ----------------------------
irf_cluster <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula  = cluster ~ countrycode + year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "Clustered")

# ----------------------------
# Combine for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot <- bind_rows(
  irf_dk,
  irf_cluster
)

# ----------------------------
# Plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot() +
  # DK ribbon (filled)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "DK"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
    alpha = 0.2
  ) +
  # Clustered CI (no fill, black line)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "Clustered"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category),
    fill = NA, linetype = "dashed", size = 1
  ) +
  # Mean line (from DK)
  geom_line(
    data = irf_dk,
    aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
    size = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = " GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

MAPS


data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>% filter(maxwind>0)
ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(GID_0) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "GID_0")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "darkblue",
    name = " Max Wind"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

NA
NA
NA
NA
NA
H <- 20  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,nlands_treat) | countrycode[year]  + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white") +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
  breaks  = c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15) / 100,
  limits  = c(-0.15, 0.15),
  labels  = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "GDP growth"
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Landfalls"
    
  )
H <- 20  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,maxwind_treat) | countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white") +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
  breaks  = c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15) / 100,
  limits  = c(-0.15, 0.15),
  labels  = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "GDP growth"
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  ) 

H <- 40 # horizon
irf_list <- list()
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
      countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    # Find first horizon where lower CI < 0
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(lower < 0), min(horizon[lower < 0]), NA),
    # Find first horizon where lower CI >= 0 AFTER going below zero
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(lower < 0) & any(lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])),
      min(horizon[lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    # Calculate recovery time
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,  # Never went below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ Inf,     # Went below 0 but never returned
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero  # Number of steps to recover
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time),color='white') +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = rev(scales::brewer_pal(type = "seq", palette = "YlOrRd", direction = -1)(9)),
  breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25,30),
  limits = c(0, 40),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "Recovery time (years)",
  labels = c("0", "5", "10", "15", "20", "25","30")
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12)
  ) 

H <- 40 # horizon
irf_list <- list()
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, nlands_treat) |
      countrycode + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    # Find first horizon where lower CI < 0
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(lower < 0), min(horizon[lower < 0]), NA),
    # Find first horizon where lower CI >= 0 AFTER going below zero
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(lower < 0) & any(lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])),
      min(horizon[lower >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[lower < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    # Calculate recovery time
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,  # Never went below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ Inf,     # Went below 0 but never returned
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero  # Number of steps to recover
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time),color='white') +
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = rev(scales::brewer_pal(type = "seq", palette = "YlOrRd", direction = -1)(9)),
  breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25,30),
  limits = c(0, 40),
  na.value = "grey",
  name = "Recovery time (years)",
  labels = c("0", "5", "10", "15", "20", "25","30")
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12)
  )
